name: Yosenju Shinchu L
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>左鎌神柱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サレンシンチュウ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If a "Yosenju" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy this card instead.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Normal Summoned: Change it to Defense Position. Your opponent cannot target "Yosenju" monsters you control with card effects, except this one.
pend_eff: If a "Yosenju" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy this card instead.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Change it to Defense Position. Your opponent cannot target "Yosenju" monsters you control with card effects, except this one.
eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Change it to Defense Position. Your opponent cannot target "Yosenju" monsters you control with card effects, except this one.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
